title: Cursed Speech - Cursed Fate Addon.
description: This mod adds Cursed Speech to the Cursed Fate Mod! It adds Explode, Don't Move, Blast Away, Get Twisted, Return, and Die.
body:
## Toge Inumaki's Cursed Speech Technique

**Ability 1: Explode**
Explode all entities in an area around you, this will deal a high amount of damage and is super good for leveling up!

**Ability 2: Don't Move**
All entities in an area around you will be unable to walk, jump, or use any abilities for a short period of time. 
(Flow: Sleep, Your target will be slowed for a longer amount of time, and will be given blindness)

**Ability 3: Blast Away**
Push back everyone in a very close radius to you, which will be able to either get them away or shoot them into the sky!
(Flow: Plummet, The target in front of your face will be sent into the ground, creating a crator around them)

**Ability 4: Get Twisted**
Twist the body of the person you are looking at, which will begin to damage them rapidly which can be combo'd with your other damage moves.
(Flow: Get Crushed, Instead of constant damage over time, it will crush their body dealing a massive amount of damage)

**Ability 5: Return**
Will make all nearby Shikigami return back to their owner, which will also make them stop attacking you. (Will work with Modded Shikigami if you dm me on discord! stxrphoria in HM)

**Ability 6: DIE!**
Attempt to kill the entity in front of you, if they are too strong they may be able to survive this attack but it will kill most low level curses, mobs, and curse users.


### This mod also adds 3 items!

Fanged Helmet: The Last and Final piece to the Jujutsu Sorcerer Armor set, that can be zipped up and down with a Keybind

Throat Medicine: Allow you to use your moves again after "Die" burns them out. (Honeycomb in a brewing stand with awkward potions)

Fanged Megaphone: Boost your moves range by two, and enhance damage and effect duration as well! (2 Gold Ingots, 1 Redstone Dust, and a Noteblock)


Discord: https://discord.gg/rgyWc3ztvK

Ko-Fi https://ko-fi.com/marcelinesorigins (Allow you to support me/Suggest CT to be made!)
